subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath educated and imbued with refinement! That which flowed from the pen of divine love was written down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ادبه الله و احسن ادبه آنچه از خامه محبت الله بر صفحه تحریر ترقیم یافت
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @review of publications, @courtesy; culture [adab]
